ddls:
CREATE TABLE "university" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university. */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the university. */,
  "location" TEXT /* City and state where the university is located. */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the university was founded. */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of university (e.g., public, private, community college). */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the United States (e.g., Northeast, Midwest, South, West). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record. */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the university. */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the enrollment data. */,
  "apps" INTEGER /* Number of applications received. */,
  "accept" INTEGER /* Number of applications accepted. */,
  "enroll" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled. */,
  "f_undergrad" INTEGER /* Number of full-time undergraduate students. */,
  "p_undergrad" INTEGER /* Number of part-time undergraduate students. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record. */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the university. */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the financial data. */,
  "outstate" INTEGER /* Tuition for out-of-state students. */,
  "room_board" INTEGER /* Cost of room and board. */,
  "books" INTEGER /* Estimated cost of books. */,
  "personal" INTEGER /* Estimated cost of personal expenses. */,
  "expend" INTEGER /* Expenditure per student. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty record. */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the university. */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the faculty data. */,
  "phd" INTEGER /* Number of faculty with PhDs. */,
  "terminal" INTEGER /* Number of faculty with terminal degrees. */,
  "s_f_ratio" REAL /* Student to faculty ratio. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alumni" (
  "alumni_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alumni record. */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the university. */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the alumni data. */,
  "perc_alumni" INTEGER /* Percentage of alumni who donate. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alumni_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduation" (
  "graduation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graduation record. */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the university. */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the graduation data. */,
  "grad_rate" INTEGER /* Graduation rate. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graduation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user. */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user. */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed). */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer). */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role. */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role. */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship. */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the user. */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the role. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)
